message: Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member(s) best able to assist.

body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

**Summary:** This issue identifies documentation gaps in the Azure Management Plane C# emitter (`eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/`) — specifically that the newly added `client-options.md` file (from PR #57924) is not linked from `index.mdx`, `README.md`, or `emitter.md`.

<details>
<summary>📋 Issue Details</summary>

**Package:** `@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt`
**Affected API:** Documentation files in `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/docs/`
**Scenarios:**
- `docs/index.mdx` has no link to the new `client-options.md` file
- `README.md` has no mention of `@clientOption` support or pointer to `client-options.md`
- `docs/emitter.md` has no cross-reference to `@clientOption` documentation despite those keys influencing resource code generation

**Root ask:** Add links/references to `client-options.md` from `index.mdx`, `README.md`, and `emitter.md` so users can discover the new documentation.
</details>

<details>
<summary>🔎 Debugging / Reproduction Notes</summary>

This is a documentation-only issue with no runtime or behavioral bug. The implementation guide in the issue body provides specific diffs for the three files to be edited.

**Suggested investigation steps:**
1. Verify that `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/docs/client-options.md` was indeed added by PR #57924
2. Confirm the three target files (`index.mdx`, `README.md`, `emitter.md`) currently lack links to `client-options.md`
3. Apply the edits described in the Implementation Guide (Steps 1a–1c) and run `npm run lint` to validate
</details>

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Confidence</summary>

- **Category:** `Mgmt` — the issue is explicitly about the management-plane C# emitter (`http-client-csharp-mgmt`), which generates `Azure.ResourceManager.*` SDKs
- **Service:** `CodeGen` — this is a code generation tooling issue in `eng/packages/`, matching the "emitter/generator in /eng/packages/ → CodeGen" rule
- **Confidence:** High — the issue unambiguously names `@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt` and the `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/` directory; no ambiguity between categories or services
</details>

<details>
<summary>👥 Owner Routing</summary>

- **Matched CODEOWNERS entry:** `# ServiceLabel: %CodeGen %Mgmt` (line 1201) — both "CodeGen" and "Mgmt" match the predicted labels
- **AzureSdkOwners:** @live1206, @ArcturusZhang, @ArthurMa1978
- **ServiceOwners:** none listed
- **Routing action:** Assigned @live1206 (random selection from multiple AzureSdkOwners); all three owners mentioned in routing comment
- **Scan notes:** Scanned bottom-to-top; entries for `%ARM %Mgmt`, `%ARM - Templates %Mgmt`, and `%CodeGen` (single label, line ~1198) were encountered but skipped because they required different label combinations or were superseded by the more specific `%CodeGen %Mgmt` entry
</details>
